summary: Tested catalog categories system: CRUD operations for hierarchical categories (4 levels max), category assignment to products, filtering, and reordering. Fixed critical UI bug with Select.Item empty value. Backend: 19/19 passed, 3 skipped (no products in catalog for some tests). Frontend: All UI features verified and working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: List categories as tree structure
Backend: List categories as flat list with levels
Backend: Create root category (level 0)
Backend: Create subcategory level 1
Backend: Create subcategory level 2
Backend: Create subcategory level 3 (max depth)
Backend: Reject 5th level category (max 4 levels enforced)
Backend: Get single category by ID
Backend: Update category name and description
Backend: Reorder categories (bulk update positions)
Backend: Filter products by category_id
Backend: Get products in specific category
Backend: Delete category with children (cascade delete)
Backend: Category validation - reject without name
Backend: 404 for non-existent category
Backend: 404 for invalid parent category
Backend: Prevent category self-reference as parent
Backend: Verify existing hierarchy (Electrónica > Smartphones > iPhone > iPhone 15)
Frontend: Categories dialog opens correctly
Frontend: Hierarchical category tree displays correctly with levels
Frontend: 'Nueva Categoría' button opens create form
Frontend: Category form includes Name, Description, Parent dropdown
Frontend: Parent category dropdown shows hierarchy with indentation
Frontend: Category creation saves and shows in list
Frontend: Catalog detail page shows category filter dropdown
Frontend: Category assignment dialog opens from product row
Frontend: Multiple categories can be selected for a product
Frontend: Category filter dropdown 'Todas las categorías' option works
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: CatalogCategories.jsx had SelectItem value='' which is invalid in Radix UI. Changed to value='none' with proper conversion logic.
Backend correctly prevents category self-reference as parent
Cascade delete works when deleting parent categories
seed_data_creation: Used existing catalog (d4b2c204-c9be-4d2f-8508-b8aaff68661a) with categories Electrónica > Smartphones > iPhone > iPhone 15
context_for_next_testing_agent: Catalog categories feature is complete and working. Categories support 4 levels of hierarchy. Products can be assigned to multiple categories. Category filter on catalog detail page works. Fixed UI bug in CatalogCategories.jsx where SelectItem had empty value - changed to 'none' with conversion logic.

categories_crud.create: Verified - root and nested categories up to 4 levels
categories_crud.read: Verified - tree and flat structures, single category by ID

product_category_assignment.assign_dialog: Opens from Tag icon in product row
product_category_assignment.filter_by_category: Dropdown in catalog detail filters products

select_item_empty_value.issue: SelectItem had value='' which is invalid in Radix UI Select component
select_item_empty_value.fix: Changed to value='none' with conversion logic: onValueChange converts 'none' to '' for backend
